samples:
I had to go and see her
She told me everything was fine
And when I asked "How come?"
She said "Love is all around"


And yet we both grow older
Each year goes by, the stars don't shine
No matter how long I try to fix things round
They just seem to fall apart inside
Get ready 'cause you're leaving now
You have no right but mine
So leave as if it kills
Leave me alone now


If love is always there for us
Why do we fight? Why should we even try?
Lost in space
Lost in time
Lost in space
Lost in time
Lost in space
Lost in time
Lost in space
Lost in time


I was wrong about many things
One of them is the world "forever"
But now I understand that it just keeps turning round
Since time began ...
Don't bow down to it now
Fight on until the end
It might not be worth the effort
Still raise your fist and fight

I don't know why
But it feels so good
To feel my heart beating


Lost in a maze of neon lights
Don't know how I got here
Lost all sense of time and space
Washed away all fears from the past


Get lost in circles, get caught in circles
Caught up in circles, turn me around


No one cares where you are going or where you've been
Go on out into the forest


Lost in a maze of neon lights
Don't know how I got here
Lost all sense of time and space
Washed away all fears from the past


Get lost in circles, get caught in circles
Caught up in circles, turn me around
Get lost in circles, get caught in circles
Caught up in circles, turn me around




Lost in a maze of neon lights
Don't know how I got here
Lost all sense of time and space
Washed away all fears from the past

Lost in a maze of neon lights
Don't know how I got here
Lost all sense of time and space
Washed away all fears from the past

So long, we've been fighting
I fight not to get older
And I don't understand the reason why



Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!


Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight!

Your eyes are closed for good now
Even when you try to see the stars above
The devil inside of you has opened wide
Until there's no door in sight anymore


Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!


Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight!

Lost your innocence a long time ago
You forget how it feels
Feel so alone out in the cold
Get ready to face reality


Wake up! Wake up! Wake up!

Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight! Get back on your feet and fight!

Lost and confused
Don't know where to go from here
I must forget
The reason why I came in here


Out of sight, out of reach
Don't think about me anymore

And when you get old enough
To find myself inside
Then I will understand everything
Everything else is black


Leave me alone
I can tell all my fears
From the flames that rise
It’s eating away me inside

And when you get old enough
To find yourself inside
Then I will understand everything
Everything else is black 


Leave me alone
Leave me alone
Leave me alone... 

Leave me alone
Leave me alone...
Leave me alone
Leave me alone...
Leave me alone
Leave me alone...
Leave me alone
Leave me alone...

Leave me alone
Leave me alone
Leave me alone...
Leave me alone..
Leave me alone
Leave me alone...
Leave me alone...

Leave me alone
Leave me alone

No fear
Don't bow, don't kneel
Be strong
You can overcome the wild
Keep a low profile
And fly away


Come out and fight for better things
Lost in this maze
But find your way back to where you belong
Your inner self is waiting



Carry on
There’s light that’s shining through
Always there
Even when life grows old
Don’t bow down
Get up, get straight
Straight from the heart
Make straight your soul


Don't bow down
Get up, get straight
Straight from the heart
Make straight your soul


Carry on
There’s light that’s shining through
Always there
Even when life grows old
Don’t bow down
Get up, get straight
Straight from the heart
Make straight your soul

Don't bow down
Get up, get straight
Straight from the heart
Make straight your soul


Carry on
There’s light that’s shining through
Always there
Even when life grows old
Don’t bow down
Get up, get straight
Straight from the heart
Make straight your soul

You are all alone
Lost cause you lie awake
Wake up and get ready for the fight of your life
And don’t forget: “The devil is right”

Don’t bow down to pressure, break free from its hold
Take back control over your life
Overcome what may come next in your wake
Don’t let anyone destroy your pride

No one can see the stars through your tears
Don’t be afraid anymore now, it's time to leave
Get on a boat and sail away forever
Leave this land behind and go beyond our reach


In this world there’s no hope left at all

There’s just one rule in this game of cat and mouse
It says :“Kill or be killed"
This is the law that rules among men
Enter the circle of your own creation
Become a god now !

When you grow old enough to understand
What truly matters most in life
Then you will protect with all your might
A master race is born and you shall lead
To create utopia

Now enter the circle

And the river runs red
Flowing, pouring, running down stream
Red is my name
For this blood that flows through my veins


I dig in to find a reason why
You've chosen to destroy me and then leave
No one can understand what you said
But I felt your blows on me until dawn came


These vultures gather round to feast
They count my ribs like grain of sand


Now it's too late for words but not for reasons
Don't get involved anymore
This world is mine
Get up and face the truth




...and the river runs red ...flowing, pouring, running down stream ...red is my name ! For this blood that flows through my veins !


Come back tomorrow morning
Come clean as glass
Clean my hands from all the dirt
Cleanse my heart once again !
Wash me clean from all the dust !
Wash me clean ! Wash me clean !
Wash me clean ! Wash me clean !
Wash me clean ! Wash me clean !

Take a long deep breath
And dive in
Leave it all behind you
Dive into your inner being


Feel the beat
It's all around you
Don't forget the reason why we fight, our reason why we care
Leave this world behind and move on

Wake up ! Wake up !
Enter now ... Enter now ... Enter now...

Get ready to dive inside yourself
Open your mind, let go of fear

Leave this world behind ! Leave it alone ! Dive right into the core of existence
Get ready to dive inside yourself
Open your mind, let go of fear

Leave this world behind ! Leave it alone ! Dive right into the core of existence
Get ready to dive inside yourself
Open your mind, let go of fear

Leave this world behind ! Leave it alone ! Dive right into the core of existence
Get ready to dive inside yourself
Open your mind, let go of fear ! Open your mind ... Let go ...

Leave this world behind ! Leave it alone ! Dive right into the core of existence
Get ready to dive inside yourself
Open your mind, let go of fear !

Wake up
Oh child of mine, open your eyes
Leave behind this cell that has kept you awake
You're on the rise

Get out there and fight against what is killing us all
No sense in crying for help when we cannot understand why things are so bleak
Lost in a maze called "existence" by those who control it all
In this cage called "planet earth", where you live or die, please do not bow down to their rules


Get out there and fight against what is killing us all
Don't lose hope, get over it, overcome this storm
And face reality
Get out there and fight against what is killing us all
Don't lose hope, get over it, overcome this storm
And face reality

Face reality
Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight!
Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight!
Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight!
Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight! Fight!

I'm on my own, I know
My soul is aching so
Don't tell me lies anymore
Just listen to my cries


When they ask why are you sad?
I tell them that it hurts too much
When they ask where do you go?
I tell them that I don't care


This pain inside of me
Is eating all the strength away
The devil took my pride
He knows this battle is mine alone


You see my body falling down
From exhaustion of a long fight
You hear me cry for help!
But there's nothing left to say...


"Please understand!"
Your love was strong enough, but now you're gone
There's no reason to cry
In fact, crying is just another way to get high...


Open your heart and try
Put an end to all of these tears!
Close your eyes and fly
Go, take flight over mountains and seas!
Leave your fears below
And find the inner child again!
